headline: P&L exposure: ₹56.1 Cr direct valuation benefit (engine estimate) + ₹40-60 Cr green financing opportunity (engine estimate)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is investor-facing and does not directly impact Tier 1/2/3 suppliers.
Estimated ₹96.2 Cr valuation uplift (engine estimate) and 10.0 bps margin improvement, with potential for P/E expansion as ESG funds rebalance portfolios.
Lower cost of capital and potential bond spread tightening, with a direct benefit of ₹56.1 Cr (engine estimate) from improved credit availability and investor sentiment.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹56.1 Cr direct valuation benefit (engine estimate) + ₹40-60 Cr green financing opportunity (engine estimate)
Revenue at risk: No revenue at risk; event is a positive valuation driver
